title: Carina Proof (v0.3)
description: A proof-assistant-formalized verification artifact bound to one finding. The slot Gowers (2026-05-08) names when he writes 'or, better still, that they had been formalized by a proof assistant.' The verifier output is the certification; Vela records who formalized what, when, against which version of which tool.

tool.description: The proof-assistant tool that produced the verifier output.

tool_version.description: Tool version, e.g. '4.7.0' for Lean, '8.18' for Coq.

script_locator.description: Content-addressed pointer to the proof script (sha256:<64hex>) or an external locator (URL, doi:, git+commit).

verifier_output_hash.description: sha256 of the verifier's success output. The hash is what makes the certification falsifiable: a third party can re-run the tool against the script and check the output matches.

verified_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when the verifier accepted the script.

scope_note.description: Optional reviewer note on what the formalization covers vs. what stays informal.
